hero.subtitle: Your Guardian in Health, Safety, and Digital Security

index.servicesHeading: Your Guardian in a Fragmented World
index.servicesSub: Discover the three pillars of ShaktiX — Health, Safety, and Cybersecurity — working together to protect and empower women in every sphere of life.
index.blockchainDesc: Own and securely share medical records across clinics and devices.
index.aiTeleclinicDesc: 24/7 triage and guidance tailored to women's health needs.
index.iotDesc: Continuous insights via wearables to detect risks early.
index.healthMore: ShaktiX Health blends secure blockchain records with 24/7 AI triage and proactive wearable insights so you stay in control of your well-being.
index.saferouteDesc: Navigate the safest paths using real-time risk signals.
index.sosDesc: Instant alerts to trusted contacts and responders with location.
index.ringDesc: Discrete hardware trigger when your hands are full or at risk.
index.safetyMore: Navigate confidently with real-time route intelligence and rapid, discreet SOS options that notify trusted contacts and responders instantly.
index.voiceDesc: Authenticate genuine voices and block spoofed calls.
index.deepfakeDesc: Detect manipulated media with explainable AI signals.
index.evidenceDesc: Timestamp and preserve proof to protect your rights.
index.cyberMore: Protect identity and reputation with advanced voice verification, deepfake detection, and immutable evidence preservation.
index.uniqueSub: Three revolutionary advantages that set us apart in women's safety and security
index.unifiedDesc: No other app combines health, safety, and cybersecurity into one comprehensive solution. Experience seamless protection across all aspects of your life.
index.proactiveDesc: We don't just react to threats; our AI actively monitors and alerts users to potential risks before they escalate into dangerous situations.
index.blockchainDesc: Our use of blockchain for health data and legal evidence provides a level of security and immutable proof that is unmatched in the industry.
index.howSub: Five simple steps to complete protection and peace of mind
index.enrollDesc: Create your secure, single-point-of-entry profile in minutes with our intuitive setup process.
index.enrollMore: We use strong encryption and privacy-by-design defaults to keep sign-up effortless and safe.
index.connectDesc: Seamlessly integrate with wearables, health apps, and other data sources for comprehensive monitoring.
index.connectMore: Connect once, and your insights keep flowing securely across devices and services.
index.protectDesc: Our advanced AI continuously monitors for threats across health, safety, and cybersecurity domains.
index.protectMore: Signals are fused from multiple domains to catch risks early and reduce false alarms.
index.alertDesc: Receive instant notifications and immediate support when potential risks are detected.
index.alertMore: Choose alert preferences and escalation paths so the right help reaches you fast.
index.secureDesc: All your data is automatically encrypted and secured on the blockchain for permanent records.
index.secureMore: Immutable proofs help with audits, care continuity, and digital rights protection.
index.testimonialsSub: Real stories from women who have transformed their safety and security with ShaktiX
index.testimonial1: The AI SafeRoute helped me feel so much more confident walking home at night. It's a game-changer for my daily commute.
index.testimonial2: My medical records are always in one place, and I know they are secure. I feel so much more in control of my health and my family's wellbeing.
index.testimonial3: It's an amazing feeling to know I have a tool that can help protect me from digital harassment. The evidence locker is brilliant for my work.
index.ctaHeading: Ready to Build a Safer Future?
index.ctaText: Join thousands of women who have already taken control of their health, safety, and digital security. Your protection starts today.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Let's build a safer future together.
contact.hint: We typically reply within 24 hours. Your information is kept confidential.
